selected_article.original_title: 문샷, 300개 에이전트 동시 운영하는 '키미 K2.6 에이전트 스웜' 공개
selected_article.reason: This article presents a breakthrough that solves a real bottleneck in AI workflows. The concept of parallel AI agents is practical, understandable through analogies, and has clear implications for developers' future work.

post_main: 지금까지 AI는 혼자서 차례차례 일했다. 한 번에 하나씩. 문샷 AI가 이걸 완전히 바꿨다. 키미 K2.6에서 300개 AI 에이전트가 동시에 돌아간다. 마치 대형 프로젝트를 300명 팀이 나눠서 처리하는 것처럼. 중앙 관리자가 작업을 쪼개서 각 에이전트에게 배분하고, 최대 4000단계까지 병렬 처리한다.
replies: 구체적으로 뭘 할 수 있을까? 웹사이트 300개 동시 분석, 보고서 여러 챕터 병렬 작성, 데이터 처리와 시각화 동시 진행 같은 일들이다.
개발자 입장에서는 게임 체인저다. 기존엔 AI 작업 하나 끝나길 기다려야 했는데, 이제 여러 작업을 동시에 돌릴 수 있다.
다만 300개 에이전트 조율이 관건이다. 하나가 꼬이면 전체가 망가질 수도. 그래도 AI 작업 속도의 새로운 기준을 제시한 셈이다.

candidate_articles.title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model V4 matters
candidate_articles.summary: On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. Notably, the model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. Like DeepSeek’s previous models, V4 is open source, meaning it is available…
candidate_articles.details: The long-awaited V4 model is more efficient and a win for Chinese chipmakers. On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. Notably, the model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. Like DeepSeek’s previous models, V4 is open source, meaning it is available for anyone to download, use, and modify. V4 marks DeepSeek’s most significant release since R1 , the reasoning model it launched in January 2025. R1, which was trained on limited computing resources, stunned the global AI industry with its strong performance and efficiency, turning DeepSeek from a little-known research team into China’s best-known AI company almost overnight. It also helped set off a wave of open-weight model releases from other Chinese AI firms. DeepSeek has kept a relatively low profile since then—but earlier this month, it effectively teased V4’s release when it added “expert” and “flash” modes to the online version of its model, prompting speculation that the updates were tied to a bigger upcoming release. While the company has become a powerful symbol of China’s AI ambitions, its big return to cutting-edge frontier models comes after months of scrutiny—including major personnel departures , delays to previous model launches , and growing scrutiny from both the US and Chinese governments. So, will V4 shake the AI field the way R1 did? Almost certainly not, but here are three big reasons why this release matters. As with R1 before it, DeepSeek clai

candidate_articles.title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
candidate_articles.summary: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.
candidate_articles.details: The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now. The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now. Google plans to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic and support the AI firm’s growing computing needs, Bloomberg reports . The Alphabet subsidiary is committing to invest $10 billion now, at a $350 billion valuation for Anthropic, with another $30 billion to follow if Anthropic hits certain performance targets, according to Anthropic. The promise of investment comes after Anthropic released its latest model, Mythos, to a limited group of partners this month. Anthropic says that Mythos is the company’s most powerful model to date and has significant cybersecurity applications. Due to potential misuse, Anthropic has restricted broader access while it works with select organizations to evaluate and address those risks — though the model has already fallen into unsanctioned hands . It’s also likely expensive to run at scale. The AI race is increasingly defined by access to the compute needed to train and deploy these systems. OpenAI has moved aggressively to secure that capacity through a web of multi-hundred-billion-dollar deals across cloud providers, chip suppliers, and energy, including an expanded deal with chipmaker Cerebras this month. Anthropic has been in a scramble of its own. The company has faced widespread complaints about Claude use limits in recent weeks and responded with a bevy of infrastructure deals. Earlier this month, Anthropic struck a deal with cloud computing provider CoreWeave f

candidate_articles.summary: 앤트로픽이 최근 개발자 커뮤니티에서 제기된 '클로드 성능 저하' 논란과 관련해 공식적으로 문제를 인정하고 원인과 해결책을 공개했다.앤트로픽은 23일(현지시간) 공식 기술 보고서를 통해 이번 AI 성능 저하 문제의 원인이 모델 자체가 아니라 이를 둘러싼 제품 레이어’ 이른바 ‘하네스(harness)’ 변경에서 비롯됐다고 밝혔다.먼저 “모델 성능을 의도적으로 낮춘 적은 없다”라며, API와 추론(inference) 계층에는 문제가 없었다고 강조했다.이번 논란은 최신 모델인 '클로드 오퍼스 4.7' 출시 이후 불거졌다. 이전보다 추론 능

candidate_articles.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
candidate_articles.summary: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.
candidate_articles.details: The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now. The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now. ComfyUI , a startup that helps creators control image, video, and audio outputs from diffusion models with a node-based workflow, has raised a $30 million funding round at a $500 million valuation. The round was led by Craft Ventures, with participation from other investors including Pace Capital, Chemistry, and TruArrow. ComfyUI was started as an open-source project in 2023, shortly after the introduction of diffusion models. At that time, models like Midjourney and OpenAI’s DALL-E were barely functional, frequently making major mistakes, such as adding extra fingers to hands. To address these limitations, the project founders developed a modular framework that gives creators granular control over every step of the generation process. Their tool gained such significant traction among creative professionals that it eventually evolved into a formal startup. In late 2024, ComfyUI raised $19 million in Series A financing from investors including Chemistry Ventures, Cursor Capital, and Guillermo Rauch, founder of Vercel. Although the latest diffusion models have come a long way from adding a sixth digit to hands, the need for the granular precision that ComfyUI offers has only grown. “If you think about your typical prompt-based solution, like Midjourney or ChatGPT, you ask for something, it [gets only] 60% – 80% there,” Yoland Yan, ComfyUI’s co-founder and CEO, told TechCrunch. “But to change that remain

In the first 24 hours of the assault on Iran, the US military struck more than 1,000 targets, nearly double the scale of the “shock and awe” attack on Iraq over two decades ago. This acceleration was made possible by AI systems that speed up the targeting process. Chief among them is the Maven Smart System. In her new book, Project Maven: A Marine Colonel, His Team, and the Dawn of AI Warfare , journalist Katrina Manson investigates the development of Maven from its inception in 2017 as an experiment in applying computer vision to drone footage. candidate_articles.title: 문샷, 300개 에이전트 동시 운영하는 '키미 K2.6 에이전트 스웜' 공개
candidate_articles.summary: 단일 AI 모델이 순차적으로 작업을 수행하던 기존 방식이 한계에 직면한 가운데, 새로운 패러다임인 ‘에이전트 군집’ 구조가 등장하며 생산성의 판을 뒤흔들고 있다. 문샷 AI는 22일(현지시간) '키미 K2.6(Kimi K2.6)'에서 최대 300개의 하위 에이전트를 동시에 운영하며 최대 4000단계에 달하는 작업을 병렬 처리할 수 있는 ‘에이전트 스웜(Agent Swarm)’을 공개했다.에이전트 스웜은 하나의 중앙 ‘오케스트레이터(Orchestrator)’가 전체 작업을 분석하고 이를 여러 하위 작업으로 분해한 뒤, 각 작업을 전문

candidate_articles.title: 텐센트, 오픈AI 연구원 영입 후 첫 모델 'Hy3' 출시..."작지만 강력"
candidate_articles.summary: 오픈AI 연구원 출신 야오순위가 최고 AI 과학자로 합류한 텐센트가 첫 AI 모델을 공개했다. 프론티어 연구소들의 최근 트렌드와 달리 소형 모델이지만, 성능은 꽤 강력한 것으로 나타났다.텐센트는 23일(현지시간) 차세대 AI 모델 ‘Hy3 프리뷰(Hy3 preview)’를 공개했다.기존 훈위안(Hunyuan) 모델 체계를 사실상 ‘재구축’한 결과물로, 성능과 비용 효율, 실제 활용성을 동시에 끌어올린 것이 특징이다. 총 매개변수는 2950억개로, 최근 1조개가 넘는 다른 중국 기업의 플래그십 모델과는 차이가 있다. 특히, 실제 연산

candidate_articles.title: MS, 스페이스X 계약 이전에 커서 인수 검토했으나 포기
candidate_articles.summary: 바이브 코딩 스타트업 커서(Cursor)를 둘러싼 빅테크 경쟁에서 마이크로소프트(MS)가 한발 물러섰던 것으로 알려졌다. candidate_articles.title: [게시판] 엘리스그룹, AI PMDC 특허 4종 취득 등 단신

bottom.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
bottom.post_main: OpenAI가 기업용 에이전트 SDK에 '샌드박스' 기능을 추가했다. 이제 AI 에이전트가 격리된 컴퓨터 환경에서만 작동하고, 특정 파일과 코드에만 접근한다. 전체 시스템은 보호받
bottom.reply_preview: 샌드박스에서 에이전트는 지정된 워크스페이스 내 파일 읽기/쓰기, 승인된 도구 사용만 가능하다. 시스템 파일이나 다른 프로젝트는 접근 불가.

bottom.title: 구글, 크롬에 사용자 반복 프롬프트 저장하는 'AI 스킬' 추가
bottom.post_main:
구글 크롬에 'AI 스킬' 기능이 추가됐다. 자주 쓰는 AI 프롬프트를 저장해서 여러 웹페이지에서 재사용할 수 있다.

기존 제미나이는 웹페이지를 요약하거나 질문하는 정도였다면,
bottom.reply_preview: 사용법은 간단하다. 크롬에서 제미나이를 열고 프롬프트를 입력한 다음, '스킬로 저장' 버튼을 누르면 끝.
